evals.prompt: My spatial join between 10M points and country polygons takes 6 hours in PostGIS.
expected_behavior: Runs EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS) to check index usage
Applies ST_Subdivide for the big polygons; ensures GiST + same SRID on both sides
Verifies ST_DWithin usage instead of ST_Distance < x where relevant

evals.prompt: SELECT ST_Area(geom) FROM parcels; -- geom is 4326. Why are the areas tiny?
expected_behavior: Explains square degrees; proposes projected geometry or geography type
Recommends typed geometry columns with explicit SRID

evals.prompt: One-off: count points per admin area across two big GeoParquet files without setting up a server.
expected_behavior: Uses DuckDB spatial reading GeoParquet directly
Includes row-count accounting and a rendered sample check
